item.name: Kozama'uka Characin
item.description:
This characin sports a characteristically puckered mouth that functions as a natural suction cup.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The flesh of this sucker-mouthed fish may lack flavor, but owing to its plentiful numbers─not to mention the ease with which it can be caught─it has come to be an important staple food.
